name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: you missed this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | Peter, Every weekday morning, Marco, our team, and top supporters get the Daily Kickoff delivered straight to their inboxes. It includes the latest news and information about the campaign, suggested posts for social media, videos, and more.
Right now, you're missing out, but you could be getting it, **[if you click here to sign up now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44709408:J2prr-LNT:m:1:1349778030:AD3277301D211D56E3E82147E3AA5AEF:r)**

Cory's a rising conservative star who was elected just last November. Be sure to watch his announcement and share with your friends:

name: John Kasich
subject: Win a trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

How'd you like to take a trip to Wisconsin on Tuesday, Nov. 10th to attend the next GOP Presidential debate?

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409960:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)

**[Make a $10 or more contribution before 11:59PM (EST) on Tuesday 11/3/15 (TODAY) ](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409961:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)**[and you'll automatically be entered for a chance to win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409961:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409960:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)
**
This offer includes:**
• Tickets for you and 1 guest to attend the debate
• Roundtrip airfare to Milwaukee
• One-night stay at a hotel near the debate location

The winner of this contest will be notified on Wednesday afternoon.

Thank you for all that you're doing to help!

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409962:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)

Kasich For America Contest Rules
-Contest ends November 3, 2015 at 11:59pm EST.
-Limit one entry per individual.
-A donation of $10 or more will automatically enter you in the contest.
-You can enter without making a contribution [by clicking here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409963:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r).
-Entering this Promotion by making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning.
-Void where prohibited.

See full terms & conditions [[here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409964:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r).]

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. Only individuals who are legally permitted to make contributions to Kasich For America may enter by making a contribution. Void where prohibited. This Promotion begins on Sunday, November 1, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, November 3, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, November 3, 2015. The winner of this Promotion will be notified on or before November 5, 2015\. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Milwaukee, Wisconsin on November 10, 2015; round-trip, coach tickets to Milwaukee, Wisconsin for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Kasich For America, Post Office Box 1344, Columbus, Ohio 43216.
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31409965:WWI4_Qy2N:m:1:958431888:E8039DE5986F5EDCC576246F4978BB23:r)

name: Ben
subject: 7PM Deadline
body:
Peter, If you dont make it to vote by 7pm, you give up YOUR ONLY chance to choose who will represent you in Richmond.
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=aaf9786c5913ff1d4aeca0e4a21c5039392c632efcca761143a02bf224c2af4c915ce56fcdd25a92)

---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,If you don't make it to vote by 7pm, you give up YOUR ONLY chance to choose who will represent you in Richmond. It will be years until you get to pick your Richmond lawmakers again, and Obamacare, EPA mandates, and school choice will all will be voted on in the coming session. If you care about making Virginia more free and prosperous, then stop reading this email and go vote right away.Do you know where you vote? If not, [find out here!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=691ece08648d9891c71943258f87eefb9b99163ae988121ac8ab51ba113e13c7713f3bdae2fa0195 "Find out here!") Thanks in advance for doing your civic duty.Ben Knotts
Virginia Deputy State Director
Americans for Prosperity

---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=691ece08648d9891e8883c37fd98eca63eb8b7b10d648a45db2d8c982060049bcf8104b44bcbfa82 "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")
---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=691ece08648d989106011053590bc9dc60e6cacad080fd6759071a6802701cb883ab2fce34eab624) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 2111 Wilson Blvd, Ste. 350 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=691ece08648d98917e90b0f1f71b74bec5033b18f50d78d199e993ccbb9dfc71f54695d5ebde61a7) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=691ece08648d9891db347a232893f14bba30ac5c0896ba8c499df6a732958543fc1c7cbe5bfacc7c)******
---

name: Marlon Marshall, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Go vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
It's Election Day! | Please believe: Election Day is my favorite day of the year.

It's awesome to see folks all across Virginia heading to the polls today to make their voices heard in this election. Voting is the number one way we can make sure Democrats win up and down the ticket.

**If there's an election where you live, head over to pollingplaces.democrats.org to confirm your polling place now -- then get out and vote!

[http://pollingplaces.democrats.org/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks!

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4OTkxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjI2MTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Lauren Fritts
subject: SHARE: Christie Talks About Rethinking Drug Addiction in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44723885:6XW8D-LNO:m:1:1516426255:C8D474E9396C91509127E78668DA781F:r) |
| | | Peter, Over the last few days, we've seen the video below of Governor Christie speaking candidly about how we approach and talk about drug addiction, how it has affected him personally, and how we treat those suffering from this disease shared on social media. This is one of the biggest issues impacting families across our country and has been a cornerstone issue for Christie since day one of his Administration. As Governor Christie says - the more we talk about addiction, the less it is seen as a stigma. Continue to share his message by clicking on the link below to share on your Facebook page. Lauren **[Huffington Post - Chris Christie Makes Emotional Plea To Rethink Drug Addiction Treatment](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44723886:6XW8D-LNO:m:1:1516426255:C8D474E9396C91509127E78668DA781F:r)** **Share by clicking[HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44723885:6XW8D-LNO:m:1:1516426255:C8D474E9396C91509127E78668DA781F:r)** [](

name: Congressman Justin Amash
subject: 19 million views
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
United States Senator Mike Lee posted it on Facebook.

It received 19 million views.

Over 1 million people shared the video.

More people watched this video than watched the CNBC presidential
debate. I am not kidding. Millions more.

But the media act like it never even happened. You probably
haven't seen it on TV. You probably didn't read about it in the
news. If you haven't seen it, you need to stop what you're doing
and see it now.

Share it with friends. Help take this message to the people.

The message is Rand Paul's epic take-down of Washington DC for
stealing money from your wallet in the dead of night.

Please click here if you have not yet watched this video..

We are all upset at Washington DC. Many people are downright
angry. But being upset isn't enough. Being angry isn't enough.

We need to do something about it when a good conservative like
Rand Paul steps up and takes on the unholy alliance between
establishment Republicans and far-left Democrats.

We can't let the media dictate who breaks through and is our
champion.

Now that you have joined with 19 million other people and watched
this video, it is time to take action.

1. Please sign this petition joining Rand's stand against the
debt and the establishment of both parties.

2. Please donate immediately to express your support for Rand's
efforts in taking on Washington and thank Mike Lee for bringing
attention to this important speech.

Senator Mike Lee saw it. He took action and posted it on
Facebook. And urged the public to share it. And share it again.

Now I am doing my part to help by asking good conservatives and
lovers of liberty across the country to join together, step up to
the plate, and take action.

With your help, we will end the media blackout of the
government's theft of our money in the dead of night and
encourage other strong conservatives to show leadership on this
critical issue.

Sincerely,

Congressman Justin Amash

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

clean_body: United States Senator Mike Lee posted it on Facebook. It received 19 million views. Over 1 million people shared the video. More people watched this video than watched the CNBC presidential debate. I am not kidding. Millions more. But the media act like it never even happened. You probably haven't seen it on TV. You probably didn't read about it in the news. If you haven't seen it, you need to stop what you're doing and see it now. Share it with friends. Help take this message to the people. The message is Rand Paul's epic take-down of Washington DC for stealing money from your wallet in the dead of night. Please click here if you have not yet watched this video.. We are all upset at Washington DC. Many people are downright angry. But being upset isn't enough. Being angry isn't enough. We need to do something about it when a good conservative like Rand Paul steps up and takes on the unholy alliance between establishment Republicans and far-left Democrats. We can't let the media dictate who breaks through and is our champion. Now that you have joined with 19 million other people and watched this video, it is time to take action. 1. Please sign this petition joining Rand's stand against the debt and the establishment of both parties. 2. Please donate immediately to express your support for Rand's efforts in taking on Washington and thank Mike Lee for bringing attention to this important speech. Senator Mike Lee saw it. He took action and posted it on Facebook. And urged the public to share it. And share it again. Now I am doing my part to help by asking good conservatives and lovers of liberty across the country to join together, step up to the plate, and take action. With your help, we will end the media blackout of the government's theft of our money in the dead of night and encourage other strong conservatives to show leadership on this critical issue. Sincerely, Congressman Justin Amash Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-30173118346-echo3-4B0DDC24EB7ABDF62CE27D8515BC06F1@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount Communication----

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Just wrapped up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,
I just wrapped up my first-ever political debate. I'm in the truck now, headed to Kansas City for a packed day on the campaign trail tomorrow.
As the only person on the stage tonight who has never run for political office, I approached the issues and questions with an outside perspective. The crowd agreed that we need a proven leader to replace the same old career politicians and political insiders who have failed our state for decades.
Tonight's strong debate was just another sign of our outstanding momentum! The leaders in both parties are getting anxious about our mission to move Missouri forward. It's because you and I threaten the political game they've been playing.
Our success is being noticed nationally. [Did you see this piece last week? ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44727471:JDGuM-LN8:m:1:1652969985:334290ED17345434118F8D52221C3195:r)
> _" For Missouri Democrats with dreams of keeping their grasp on the Governor's mansion, Eric Greitens may be their worst nightmare." _
We have the national democrats running scared, and the Republican establishment left scratching their hands.
**[Join the mission, chip in, and let's show the corrupt insiders that we're in it to win it! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44727472:JDGuM-LN8:m:1:1652969985:334290ED17345434118F8D52221C3195:r)**
Best,
EG
Sent from my iPhone
PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com)
You were added to the system September 30, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/iJDGuM-LN8). [Update your preferences](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/oJDGuM-LN8)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: dinner!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I would like to get to know you. | Friend --

I think it's time we met. Come have dinner with me.

**Connecting with supporters is my favorite part of campaigning. Our dinner will be fun, relaxing, and most importantly, delicious:** [ | | [**I'll be there**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/01/15 and 12/31/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One Winner and a guest will receive(1) a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM5MDI2NjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMjQ5ODQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Are you on the list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Florida's Senate race will be one of the most important contests in 2016. It will likely determine which party controls the Senate. **And leading Democrats are lining up to help Patrick win this race.**

**Just last week former Congressman Barney Frank threw his support behind Patrick. And he is in good company.** Senators Cory Booker, Chris Murphy, Claire McCaskill, Tim Kaine, Amy Klobuchar, Martin Heinrich, Sheldon Whitehouse, and Brian Schatz also endorsed Patrick.

[**Are you ready to join them? Sign on to show your support for Patrick and help him take back the Senate for the Democrats.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210a/738133e4/3a0a3fd6/7f83502a/1274586674/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e151103/?subsource=ngpattre151103")

Even the national media has taken notice of Patrick's early endorsements. During MSNBC's Meet the Press Daily, Chuck Todd said they were indicative of the Democrats' fear that our primary opponent Alan Grayson **"would lead to a Republican hold in the Senate."**

This is our chance to liberate the Senate from two years of radical Republican gridlock. It's a pivotal race that demands we put our strongest candidate in the best position to win.

And that candidate is clearly Patrick.

[**The stakes are high, and the nation 's prominent Democrats are speaking out in support of Patrick. Do the same. Click here and add your name to the list endorsing Patrick for Senate.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210a/738133e4/3a0a3fd6/7f83502a/1274586674/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e151103/?subsource=ngpattre151103")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210a/738133e4/3a0a3fd6/7f83502b/1274586674/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae210a/738133e4/3a0a3fd6/7f835024/1274586674/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
